debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
split_ifs with h_eq
  · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    have h_eval : Exp.eval (bits2num_e args) = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
      simp only [List.foldl_toArray']
      generalize args.toList = l
      have : ∀ e, Exp.eval (l.foldl (fun acc b => .v b + .c 2 * acc) e) =
        l.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) (Exp.eval e) := by
        intro e; induction l generalizing e <;> simp [*, Exp.eval]
      exact this (.c 0)
    exact (h (h_eq.symm.trans h_eval)).elim
  · rfl
